summary: Iteration 198: POS Attachments & Scadenza Bug Fix - All features working correctly. Backend 21/21 tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with date save, toggle switches, and expiry badges.

issues: Console warning: `value` prop on input should not be null - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/company/documents/sicurezza-globali/{doc_type} correctly updates scadenza without requiring file re-upload
GET /api/company/documents/sicurezza-globali returns correct expiry flags (days_to_expiry, is_expiring, is_expired)
Expiry alert logic working: is_expiring=true when 0 < days_to_expiry <= 15, is_expired=true when days_to_expiry <= 0
GET /api/company/documents/allegati-pos returns all 3 POS attachment types with includi_pos status
POST /api/sicurezza/export-cse/{commessa_id} ZIP correctly includes only allegati with includi_pos=true in 05_ALLEGATI_POS folder
Frontend DocumentiAziendaTab shows date input with save button (floppy icon) that persists scadenza
Frontend AllegatiPosTab shows toggle switches for 'Includi nel POS' that work correctly
ExpiryBadge component shows 'Valido' (green), days countdown (yellow/amber), 'Scaduto' (red) based on scadenza date
DVR is correctly included in 00_DOCUMENTI_AZIENDA folder of CSE export ZIP
seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: DURC with scadenza, Visura, DVR uploaded. All 3 allegati POS (rumore, vibrazioni, mmc) uploaded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 198 verified POS Attachments & Scadenza Bug Fix. Key findings: (1) PATCH endpoint for scadenza works without file re-upload - date persists correctly. (2) Expiry alert logic: is_expiring=true for 0-15 days, is_expired=true for <=0 days. (3) Allegati POS (rumore, vibrazioni, mmc) all uploaded with toggle switches working. (4) CSE export ZIP includes 05_ALLEGATI_POS folder with only docs where includi_pos=true. (5) Frontend shows both 'Checklist Documenti CIMS' and 'Allegati Tecnici POS' sections in Settings > Documenti tab. (6) ExpiryBadge shows correct colors: green=Valido, yellow/amber=expiring, red=Scaduto.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/company/documents/sicurezza-glo: PASS - Returns all 5 doc types with expiry flags
backend_endpoints.PATCH /api/company/documents/sicurezza-g: PASS - Updates scadenza without file upload
backend_endpoints.GET /api/company/documents/allegati-pos: PASS - Returns all 3 POS attachment types
backend_endpoints.POST /api/sicurezza/export-cse/{commessa: PASS - ZIP includes 05_ALLEGATI_POS with correct files

SettingsPage (/settings).docs_table: PASS - data-testid='docs-table' with all 5 doc rows
SettingsPage (/settings).allegati_table: PASS - data-testid='allegati-table' with all 3 allegato rows
SettingsPage (/settings).expiry_badge: PASS - Shows Valido/days/Scaduto based on date
